args.message: The body inspection came back clean, which is good to hear. What kind of mileage can I realistically expect from this Jeep on a daily commute?

text: The body inspection came back clean, which is good to hear. What kind of mileage can I realistically expect from this Jeep on a daily commute?

speaker: seller

args.message: Mileage? You're looking at a solid daily driver here. These Pentastar V6 engines are surprisingly efficient for what they are. I've seen guys get, you know, anywhere from 17 to 20 MPG on the highway, depending on how heavy your foot is. Around town, maybe a bit less, but still very respectable for a 4x4 like this. It’s a great mix of capability and, dare I say, economy!
